---
name: Stale citation (superseded / withdrawn / amended)
about: Report a citation in findings/_current.md or any skill reference that is no longer current
title: "stale: [finding-id] [short reason] (e.g. 'stale: FIND-2026-001 overruled by BGH')"
labels: ["stale-citation", "needs-verification"]
---

## What's stale

<!-- Which finding ID or reference file is affected? -->

Finding ID or file path: 

Current text/citation: 

## Why it's stale

- [ ] Ruling was overruled by a higher court
- [ ] Statute was amended or replaced
- [ ] The cited URL is broken / redirects to unrelated content
- [ ] The ruling has been superseded by an EU-level decision
- [ ] The text mis-summarises the actual holding (paraphrase error)
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## Evidence

<!-- Required. Primary source for the superseding ruling / amended statute. Tier-1 only. -->

URL: 

Citation of new authoritative source: 

## Proposed action

- [ ] Update the citation to point to the new authority
- [ ] Move to `superseded` status in `lifecycle.json`
- [ ] Remove entirely (no longer relevant)
- [ ] Mark `withdrawn` with an explanatory note

## Verification status

- [ ] I have read the new primary source
- [ ] The new source is verifiable at Tier 1 (gesetze-im-internet.de / court / EUR-Lex / openjur.de)
- [ ] This change doesn't conflict with another active finding in the catalogue
